productDisplayName: Levis Men Jazz Stripes Green Brief
description: Composition Blue with black, maroon and yellow stripes brief made of 100% combed cotton ribbed fabric, has a cushioned signature logo on the contrast waistband, shaped-to-Fit double layered contoured pouch, reinforced ribbed leg bands and printed label on the inner Fit Mid rise Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Warm iron if needed This jazz brief from levis is crafted using superior cotton fabric that provides breathability. The cut allows free leg movement, the double layered pouch gives enhanced durability while the printed label on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort.
